metadata.description: Enhanced N5 grammar filtering with 15 patterns
improvements: Fixed ている false rejection risk
Added てある, ておく, てしまう patterns
Added たことがある, ながら patterns
Added ように, ために, てもいい patterns

filters.grammar: N5 only - comprehensive N4+ rejection (15 patterns)
